x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: The TPRM base plugin (sn_vdr_risk_asmt) is the foundational requirement for all third-party risk management capabilities including Now Assist assessment summarization and AI-powered vendor risk scoring. Without this plugin no TPRM AI features can be activated.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Install Third-party Risk Management from the ServiceNow Store.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_d3f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c28
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[The TPRM base plugin (sn_vdr_risk_asmt) is the foundational requirement for all third-party risk management capabilities including Now Assist assessment summarization and AI-powered vendor risk scoring. Without this plugin no TPRM AI features can be activated.]]></ai_justification><check_name>TPRM Plugin Installed</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
sa.addQuery("scope","sn_vdr_risk_asmt");
sa.setLimit(1);sa.query();
if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"TPRM is installed."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"Third-party Risk Management (sn_vdr_risk_asmt) is not installed. All TPRM AI checks cannot be evaluated."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>TPRM</module><number>CHK0000581</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Install Third-party Risk Management from the ServiceNow Store.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>d3f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c28</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>TPRM Plugin Installed</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_d3f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c28</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
